item.title: because the world needs good vibes.
item.description: Not everything has to be horrible. Dude got a Slurpy, it's a victory.
item.dc:creator: JoeT85

item.title: Constitution.congress.gov has edited the constitution
item.description: Edit: the page has been restored and the original text of the constitution now reads as it should. They claim it was a programming error but the links to the missing text had been removed from multiple pages which I checked before originally uploading. Original post: The congressional constitution website has removed part of Article 1 section 8, and all of Article 1 Section 9 and 10 including the prohibition on the suspension of the writ of habeas corpus, the prohibition on the passing of ex post facto laws, and trade duties enumerated to Congress. The purpose of this could be to poison AI searches and to prevent them from returning results that include these sections. This is a willful and treasonous attack on the constitution. Here is a way back machine search showing the change https://web.archive.org/web/diff/20250601021212/20250806023110/https://constitution.congress.gov/constitution/
item.dc:creator: Malcondrion

item.title: fat republican pig tells americans they don`t deserve healthcare and the pig expects people to clap rather than be hanged by his own bowel
item.dc:creator: Dr3sd4

item.title: I moved AGAIN comic!
item.description: Well that was a ride! If you got through all of that then I salute you! And also thanks for sticking through. But yeah! I’m essentially doubling down on my workload. More posts, more art, more commissions! I really want to own a home where my partner is down South (the prices there are pretty crazy and pretty much £350-£400k for a 1 bedroom house..) I could stay up north but it’s just not really feasible with his job at the moment. Otherwise you’d see me in Wales ASAP!(is it bad there too?) I know house prices suck pretty much EVERYWHERE atm, so if you’re also struggling I feel ya. Everything is a lot and tbh I’m just lucky to even get the support I do. So THANKYOU! - Here’s the links! https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella patreon.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Youths!
item.description: Most viral edit: Thanks for the upvotes, despite my boneheaded mistake in the original post. I found an article that talks in depth about why the numbers are down and doesn’t blame the “youths”. This LA times write up does a decent job to breaking down the tourism numbers and the importance of CA to Vegas. https://www.latimes.com/california/story/2025-08-04/vegas-tourism-is-slumping-are-californians-staying-home Spoiler alert, Vegas is screwed because of a combination of self inflicted injuries (everything is expensive AF) and overall drop in domestic and international tourism. It is low key kinda funny that Discharge is fucking up another city that’s full of hotels and casinos LMAO. Maybe this was his long term revenge plan for Atlantic City. I’m going to bed, enough Imgur for today. Stay fresh, cheese baggs Original post: Pretty sure people are skipping Vegas because no one feels safe traveling to America where ICE is prowling the streets and, Discharge is in the office again. First time was a fluke, now it’s a pattern. People are also skipping Vegas because every company is scrambling to assess the impacts from tariffs and how they are going to source material once they hit certain countries. Idk what NYP is on about, but I’m sure they gotta blame someone and why not the youths!
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars
Icantanymore1943

item.title: With apples and alleles: asymmetrical crossover in meiosis can skew trait expression toward one parent.
item.dc:creator: Multipass

item.title: After this man's wife passed away, his children adopted a shelter dog for him to keep him company. Best decision in the world
item.dc:creator: thefatherslasthope

item.title: Life goes on I guess
item.description: My dad’s been battling brain cancer for 7 years. Was totally fine, in full health less than a week ago. He got rushed into hospital yesterday and he’s got days to live. Laying in bed, can’t sleep and everyone I know is sleeping. We worked together for 50 hours a week for the last 12 years. All I can think about is going into work tomorrow and seeing his tools and his stuff that he’ll never touch again. All the customers I’ll have to call and tell them they won’t hear from him again. All the knowledge and wisdom he has that will forever be lost because I never had a chance to learn it all. Time to scream into the void I guess.
item.dc:creator: AskMeWhyNot

item.title: Rowling psychotically says boycott - innocent worker
item.description: https://www.thepinknews.com/2025/08/06/jk-rowling-marks-spencer-ms-trans-complaint/ An innocent worker, doing their job, was accused of being trans just for being tall. Now, Rowling is calling for a boycott. Why don't you let the CEO know how you feel about predatory billionaires funneling money into discriminatory laws that encourage the public to grift off the suffering of trans people: ceo@customer-support.marksandspencer.com https://www.marksandspencer.com/help-and-support/contact/still-need-help Don't let abusers be the only voices heard. You can let the CEO know that you don't support profiling innocent workers for doing their job just because a predatory billionaire said tall women are trans.
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Kids and Family Memes Vol 2
item.description: I'm picking back up where I left off clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: Alright, LISTEN UP.
item.description: EVERY LAST ONE OF YOU HAD BETTER PAY ATTENTION TO THIS AND TAKE IT TO HEART, GODDAMMIT. (This includes me, I think I need to hear this on a loop every morning. Body dysmorphia is a bitch.) * * * * * DISCLAIMER: The person in this video is not me, no matter how much I wish it were. Her name is Maisie Lynn and I don't have a link for you because I'm too lazy to look it up right now. (But if someone else provides one I will totally update this post, I promise.) FRONT PAGE EDIT: A kind commenter has provided the link for her, but it's a TT link so...yeah. Here it is anyway: https://www.tiktok.com/@maisielynnie/video/7527711613558836493

item.title: Libs of TikTok needs to be shut down by force
item.description: Libs of Tiktok the TERRORIST is such a loser. And she's emboldened by this sh!t administration. She needs to be jailed and thrown off the internet. https://www.splcenter.org/resources/extremist-files/chaya-raichik/ Front page y'all! Happy to be educating those who don't know the horrible horrible LIBSOFTIKTOK and Chaya Raichik - and hoping everyone spreads the word on how vile and disgusting this terrorist murderer is!

item.title: Those were the Days my Friend, it was 1983 (6 of 6)
item.description:
Bananarama 1983 Cruel Summer
Billy Joel 1983 The Longest Time
Def Leppard 1983 Foolin'
Dire Straits 1983 Twisting By The Pool
Heaven 17 1983 Temptation
Kajagoogoo 1983 Too Shy
Kenny Rogers & Sheena Easton 1983 We Got Tonight
Matthew Wilder 1983 Break My Stride
Neil Young 1983 Wonderin'
Quiet Riot 1983 Bang Your Head
Spandau Ballet 1983 Gold
Talking Heads 1983 Burning Down the House
Weird Al Yankovic 1983 Ricky
ZZ Top 1983 Sharp Dressed Man
